result:
no repo, no code, no stack — can't fix blind.
need minimum to triage:
- platform (web, mobile, desktop)
- browser + console errors on click
- network tab: request fires? status code? response body?
- does button click register at all (onclick logs)?
- worked before? what changed recently?
- all users or subset (region, browser, auth provider)?

fastest checks while gathering:
- auth provider status page (google/github/okta down?)
- recent deploy — rollback candidate?
- cert/domain expiry on callback url
- cors/csp headers blocking redirect
- cookie samesite flipped by browser update

paste console + network output, i dig in.
